relationships.description: NSM GP Category 1 'Identifisere og kartlegge' maps to NIST CSF 'Identify' function. Both establish situational awareness of assets, governance, and risk.
NSM GP Category 2 'Beskytte og opprettholde' maps to NIST CSF 'Protect' function. Both cover safeguards including access control, data security, and secure configuration.
NSM GP Category 3 'Oppdage' maps to NIST CSF 'Detect' function. Both cover vulnerability detection, security monitoring, and analysis.
NSM GP Category 4 'Håndtere og gjenopprette' maps to NIST CSF 'Respond' function. Both cover incident response preparation, handling, and communications.
NSM GP Category 4 'Håndtere og gjenopprette' also maps to NIST CSF 'Recover' function, covering recovery planning and post-incident improvement.
NSM GP 1.1 'Kartlegg styringsstrukturer, leveranser og understøttende systemer' maps to NIST CSF ID.AM (Asset Management), covering governance structures and asset inventory.
NSM GP 1.1 includes identifying risk management processes (tiltak 1.1.3) and risk tolerance limits (1.1.4), relating to ISO 31000 risk assessment methodology.
NSM GP 1.1 risk management identification (tiltak 1.1.3-1.1.4) relates to NIS2 risk analysis obligation. Both require understanding risk processes and tolerance.
NSM GP 1.2 'Kartlegg enheter og programvare' maps to NIST CSF ID.AM asset inventory requirements. Both require maintaining hardware and software inventories.
NSM GP 1.3 'Kartlegg brukere og behov for tilgang' relates to NIST CSF PR.AA identity management by mapping user categories and access needs as input to access control.
NSM GP 2.1 'Ivareta sikkerhet i anskaffelses- og utviklingsprosesser' implements NIST SP 800-53 System and Services Acquisition (SA) family, covering procurement security and secure development.
NSM GP 2.1 security in acquisition maps to NIS2 acquisition security requirement. Both mandate security criteria in ICT procurement.
NSM GP 2.1 includes outsourcing security (tiltak 2.1.9-2.1.10), relating to NIS2 supply chain security requirements for service provider management.
NSM GP 2.1 outsourcing and procurement controls (tiltak 2.1.9-2.1.10) implement NIST SP 800-53 Supply Chain Risk Management (SR) family for supplier assessment.
NSM GP 2.2 'Etabler en sikker IKT-arkitektur' implements NIST SP 800-53 System and Communications Protection (SC) family, covering network segmentation and boundary protection.
NSM GP 2.3 'Ivareta en sikker konfigurasjon' implements NIST SP 800-53 Configuration Management (CM) family, covering baseline configurations and change control.
NSM GP 2.4 'Beskytt virksomhetens nettverk' implements NIST SP 800-53 SC family for network access control, firewall, and encryption requirements.
NSM GP 2.5 'Kontroller dataflyt' implements NIST SP 800-53 SC family controls for data flow enforcement between network zones and boundary protection.
NSM GP 2.6 'Ha kontroll på identiteter og tilganger' implements NIST SP 800-53 Access Control (AC) family, covering account management and least privilege.
NSM GP 2.6 identity and authentication controls (including MFA in 2.6.7) implement NIST SP 800-53 Identification and Authentication (IA) family.
NSM GP 2.6 'Ha kontroll på identiteter og tilganger' maps to NIST CSF PR.AA (Identity Management and Access Control).
NSM GP 2.6 identity and access control maps to NIS2 HR security and access control requirements.
NSM GP 2.6.7 'Bruk multi-faktor autentisering' implements NIS2 multi-factor authentication requirement.
NSM GP 2.7 'Beskytt data i ro og i transitt' maps to NIST CSF PR.DS (Data Security), covering encryption and data protection.
NSM GP 2.7 data protection with cryptography implements NIS2 cryptography and encryption requirement.
NSM GP 2.7 data protection implements NIST SP 800-53 Media Protection (MP) family for data classification, encryption, and secure handling.
NSM GP 2.7 data protection implements ISO 27001 Annex A cryptography and information classification controls.
NSM GP 2.8 'Beskytt e-post og nettleser' implements NIS2 cyber hygiene requirements for email and web security.
NSM GP 2.9 'Etabler evne til gjenoppretting av data' implements NIST SP 800-53 Contingency Planning (CP) family, including backup and recovery testing.
NSM GP 2.9 data recovery capability implements NIS2 business continuity requirement for backup management and disaster recovery.
NSM GP 2.10 'Integrer sikkerhet i prosess for endringshåndtering' relates to NIST SP 800-53 Configuration Management (CM) change control processes.
NSM GP 3.1 'Oppdag og fjern kjente sårbarheter og trusler' implements NIST SP 800-53 Risk Assessment (RA) vulnerability scanning and threat monitoring controls.
NSM GP 3.1 automated threat handling (tiltak 3.1.3) implements NIST SP 800-53 System and Information Integrity (SI) malware protection controls.
NSM GP 3.2 'Etabler sikkerhetsovervåkning' implements NIST SP 800-53 Audit and Accountability (AU) family for logging, monitoring, and data integrity.
NSM GP 3.2 security monitoring implements NIS2 monitoring and logging requirements as part of risk management measures.
NSM GP 3.3 'Analyser data fra sikkerhetsovervåkning' implements ISO 27001 Annex A operational security controls for event analysis and threat intelligence.
NSM GP 3.4 'Gjennomfør inntrengningstester' implements NIST SP 800-53 RA penetration testing requirements (RA-5) for proactive vulnerability discovery.
NSM GP 4.1 'Forbered virksomheten på håndtering av hendelser' implements NIST SP 800-53 Incident Response (IR) planning, training, and testing requirements.
NSM GP 4.2 'Vurder og klassifiser hendelser' maps to NIS2 incident handling requirement for structured incident assessment.
NSM GP 4.2.3 'Informer relevante interesseparter' implements NIS2 incident reporting obligation to competent authorities.
NSM GP 4.3 'Kontroller og håndter hendelser' implements NIS2 business continuity requirement for incident containment and recovery.
NSM GP 4.3 incident control and handling implements NIST SP 800-53 IR incident response execution controls.
NSM GP 2.1 security in acquisition and development implements ISO 27001 Annex A supplier relationship and system acquisition controls.
